name: Kahumana Farm Cafe
tagline: A farm-to-table cafe hidden deep in the Waianae Valley, serving food harvested from the surrounding organic gardens.
parking: Free lot on the farm property
talkStory: Kahumana Organic Farm and Cafe is a nonprofit founded in 1974 as a therapeutic community in the back of Waianae Valley. The cafe serves lunch made with ingredients literally harvested that morning from the surrounding 30-acre organic farm. It also functions as transitional housing and job training for adults with developmental disabilities and those experiencing homelessness. The setting — surrounded by Waianae mountains and farmland — feels like another island entirely. Open Wed-Sat for lunch; call ahead to confirm.
